ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle segment (e.g., e-2W, e-3W autos) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle segment */,
  "capacity" REAL /* The capacity of the vehicle segment (e.g., battery capacity in kWh) */,
  "emissions_reduction" REAL /* The estimated reduction in emissions for vehicles in this segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle segment for which the incentive is available */,
  "incentive_amount" REAL /* Incentive amount per kWh */,
  "max_incentive_per_vehicle" REAL /* Maximum incentive amount per vehicle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the incentive program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the incentive program */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* The total budget allocated for the incentive program */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* The remaining budget for the incentive program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* A description of the eligibility criteria for the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incentives_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES vehicle_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* The name of the contact person at the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* The website of the manufacturer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the manufacturer registered with the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle segment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* The battery capacity of the vehicle in kWh */,
  "range" INTEGER /* The range of the vehicle in kilometers */,
  "emissions" REAL /* The estimated emissions reduction for the vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* The price of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the vehicle (e.g., available, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentive_disbursals" (
  "disbursal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive disbursal */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incentive claim being disbursed */,
  "disbursal_date" TEXT /* Date the disbursal was made */,
  "disbursal_amount" REAL /* Amount disbursed */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method of disbursal (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the disbursal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the auditor who reviewed the disbursal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incentive_disbursals_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manufacturer, buyer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyer_incentive_disbursals" (
  "disbursal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive disbursal */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incentive claim being disbursed */,
  "disbursal_date" TEXT /* Date the disbursal was made */,
  "disbursal_amount" REAL /* Amount disbursed */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method of disbursal (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the disbursal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the auditor who reviewed the disbursal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyer_incentive_disbursals_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., login, claim submission) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to perform the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
